hero.subtitle: Blackstone Protective Service Ltd delivers elite uniformed guarding, executive close protection, and electronic security solutions — built on discipline, integrity, and precision.

services_section.title: Comprehensive Security Solutions
services_section.subtitle: Five integrated service pillars, each staffed by vetted, trained professionals — engineered to eliminate risk at every level.

services.title: Manned Guarding & Physical Security
services.description: Our core service delivers professional, disciplined security personnel for 24/7 protection. Static/On-Site Guarding: Trained guards for offices, residential estates, industrial facilities, banks, schools, hospitals, and construction sites (unarmed or armed options where permitted). Mobile Patrols: Vehicle and foot patrols for estates, commercial zones, and high-risk areas to deter threats and ensure rapid response. Estate & Residential Security: Comprehensive perimeter control, access management, visitor screening, and community protection for gated estates and private homes. Corporate & Industrial Security: Robust protection for warehouses, factories, oil & gas sites, and business premises.
services.image_alt: German Shepherd K9 security unit with muzzle

services.title: Executive & Personal Protection
services.description: We provide discreet, high-level security for individuals who require close protection. VIP & Executive Close Protection: Professional bodyguards and protection teams for high-net-worth individuals, executives, and dignitaries. Armed Escorts & Journey Management: Secure transportation and escorts for personnel, cash-in-transit, and valuable assets across Lagos and beyond. Family & Personal Security Details: Customized protection plans for families and individuals in high-risk environments.
services.image_alt: Suited operative opening a car door for executive protection

services.title: Event Security & Crowd Management
services.description: Make your events safe, seamless, and memorable with professional security support. Event Security: Trained personnel for weddings, concerts, corporate conferences, parties, product launches, and public gatherings. Crowd Control & Access Management: Efficient screening, traffic control, and on-site coordination to prevent incidents. Special Event Risk Assessment: Pre-event planning and real-time management.
services.image_alt: City skyline with security shield overlays representing event security

services.title: Electronic & Technology-Driven Security
services.description: Leverage modern systems for smarter, more efficient protection. CCTV Surveillance Systems: Installation, 24/7 monitoring, and maintenance of high-definition cameras with remote access and recording. Alarm Systems & Rapid Response: Intrusion detection, panic buttons, and immediate armed/unarmed response teams. Access Control Solutions: Biometric scanners, smart cards, RFID systems, turnstiles, and automated gates. Integrated Security Platforms: Centralized control room combining CCTV, alarms, GPS tracking, and analytics for real-time threat management.
services.image_alt: CCTV camera with digital lock overlay for electronic security

services.title: Security Consulting & Specialized Services
services.description: Beyond physical presence, we help you build long-term resilience. Security Risk Assessment & Consultancy: Thorough threat analysis, vulnerability audits, and development of comprehensive security strategies. Security Training Programs: Customized training for your staff or our operatives in conflict de-escalation, first aid, customer service, and advanced techniques. Background Checks & Investigations: Professional employee vetting, due diligence, and private investigations. Fire Safety & Emergency Preparedness: Fire prevention audits, equipment supply, and basic emergency response planning.
services.image_alt: Dome CCTV camera on a pole against a glass building

about_preview.title: A Legacy of Trust, Built on the Ground
about_preview.body1: Founded with a single mandate — to protect what matters most — Blackstone Protective Service Ltd has grown into one of Nigeria's most respected security organisations. We combine rigorous training, modern technology, and an unwavering commitment to duty.
about_preview.body2: Our operatives are not just guards; they are professionals who understand that every client represents a responsibility. We don't merely secure spaces — we build trust.

pillars.title: NIS Licensed
pillars.body: Fully licensed and compliant with Nigeria's security industry regulations.

pillars.title: Rigorous Vetting
pillars.body: Multi-stage background checks on every operative before deployment.

pillars.title: Ongoing Training
pillars.body: Continuous professional development and quarterly tactical drills.

pillars.title: Rapid Response
pillars.body: Dedicated control room ensuring response within minutes.

about_preview.image_alt: Blackstone security operative in black uniform

cta_banner.title: Ready to Secure Your World?
cta_banner.subtitle: Speak with a security specialist today. We assess your risk, design a bespoke solution, and deploy within 72 hours.
